since_last: 19% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.81%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 19% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.46% · BTC -0.91% · Gold -1.15% · Nasdaq100 -1.27%. 19% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.81%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.81%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at -8.22%
cards.body: Leaders: ISRG +3.31%, AVAV +2.95%, BIDU +2.36%, SPCX +1.65%, SO +1.42%. Laggards: CEVA -8.22%, SKHY -7.75%, ARM -6.54%, INOD -5.82%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.65% at $137.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
